/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/cw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cw1_world_spawner/srv/detail/task_setup__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cw1_world_spawner/srv/detail/task1_service__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cw1_world_spawner/srv/detail/task2_service__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cw1_world_spawner__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cw1_world_spawner/srv/detail/task3_service__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
